source_title: Nginx serves 502 after moving a FastAPI service
selected_text: The systemd service was using a different working directory. Set WorkingDirectory to the project directory and restart both the service and Nginx.
surrounding_context: The application worked when started manually but returned 502 through Nginx after being configured as a systemd service.
user_note: Every common socket and permission fix failed. Setting WorkingDirectory was the only thing that fixed this on my VPS. Check the deployment path before copying it.
